NOTICE OF MOTIONA ND OTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND SELECT AN ARBITRATOR, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR APR-14-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND SELECT AN ARBITRATOR. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE COURT SELECTS THE FOLLOWING AS POTENTIAL ARBITRATORS: 1. HON. ARMEN SEVERIAN; 2. HON. ALFRED CHIANTELLI; 3. HON. NAT AGLIANO; 4. HON. ALEX SALDAMANDO; 5. HON. MARGARET KEMP. JUDGE: QUENTIN KOPP; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR 5797

Notice Of Motiona Nd Otion To Compel Arbitration And Select An Arbitrator
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion to Compel Arbitration and Select An Arbitrator. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel arbitration is granted. The Court selects the following as potential arbitrators: 1., Honorable Armen Severian; 2., Honorable Alfred Chiantelli; 3., Honorable Nat Agliano; 4., Honorable Alex Saldamando; 5., Honorable Margaret Kemp. (302KOPP/PB)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
